# The Essentials
Python is a very versatile programming language and therefore one of the most widely used. The Python base provides the fundamental framework for statistical programming. Specialized modules significantly extend its functionality. You can learn more about this in the video.

<div style="position: relative; width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 16 / 9;">
  <iframe src="https://av.tib.eu/player/71645" allowfullscreen style="position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;"></iframe>
</div>
